styles.name: Editorial Forest
styles.description: A serif-led editorial system in the register of a literary quarterly or art-book monograph. Deep forest green, dusty rose pink, and oat-cream paper with Source Serif 4 display and JetBrains Mono chrome. Flat color only, no gradients or shadows.

styles.name: Bold Poster
styles.description: A populist editorial poster system mashing vintage Italian sports-magazine display lettering with classical serif body. Shrikhand display at poster scale with a single fire-engine red accent on white newsprint. Loud, confident, unmistakably print-poster.

styles.name: BlockFrame
styles.description: Maximalist neobrutalist system with 4px solid black borders, 8px hard offset shadows, and a high-key candy palette of five saturated pastels. Display type is heavy uppercase Inter. Tilted decorative shapes break the grid intentionally. Bold, joyful, slightly chaotic.

styles.name: Monochrome
styles.description: A single-surface editorial palette with no accent color at all. Warm off-yellow cream canvas, very dark olive-black ink, two graphite tones. Quiet, restrained, text-first: distinction comes from scale, weight, and spacing, never from color. Jost ultra-light + Lora italic + JetBrains Mono.

styles.name: Raw Grid
styles.description: Neo-brutalist system where the borders ARE the layout. Pure white canvas, 3px solid black structure, two muted pastel accents (blush + sage). Depth is hard black offset shadows. Cells abut without gaps. Sharp, system-native, digital brutalism.

styles.name: Neo-Grid Bold
styles.description: Heavy editorial poster system on a strict block grid with one neon-lemon accent on putty-ecru. Space Grotesk uppercase display + JetBrains Mono chrome. Each slide reads as a magazine spread divided into colored panels. Dead flat, no shadows.

styles.name: Coral
styles.description: Bold magazine-poster system on three surface registers — coral fire, ink black, and warm cream. Bebas Neue display caps with 45° diagonal hatch pattern. Mid-century travel posters meets modern editorial sport magazines. Single coral hue as both accent and environment.

styles.name: Pin & Paper
styles.description: Field-notebook editorial system: yellow legal-pad paper with deep cobalt-blue ink, hand-drawn safety-pin SVG illustrations, paper-grain texture. Space Grotesk headlines + Caveat handwriting + DM Mono archival labels. Analog field reports meet vintage public-notice boards.

styles.name: Soft Editorial
styles.description: Warm magazine-spread aesthetic — Cormorant Garamond serif on warm paper with pastel candy accents (dusty pink, chartreuse, peach blush, sage, lilac). Generous rounded cards float on translucent white over cream. Editorial calm with riso-print color.

styles.name: Grove
styles.description: Quiet editorial-serif system: deep forest green canvas with cream type, classical Playfair Display serifs, and a single terracotta coral accent. The calm authority of a literary journal or boutique brand book. Generous negative space and hairline borders.

styles.name: Long Table
styles.description: Warm single-ink editorial system in the spirit of a printed supper-club menu or Risograph program. One buttery cream surface, one rust terracotta ink for everything. Bricolage Grotesque uppercase display + Fraunces serif body. Cozy, rustic, confidently monochrome.

styles.name: Stencil & Tablet
styles.description: West Coast skate-poster meets municipal stencil signage. Stardos Stencil headlines with ink-break gaps, Barlow Condensed chrome, bone-cream field tiled with rounded color tablets in a saturated retro-print accent set. Industrial poster meets vintage workshop sign.

styles.name: 8-Bit Orbit
styles.description: Pixel-art neon arcade aesthetic on a deep navy void. CRT screen at 2am: cyberpunk, gaming, web3, indie dev tools.

styles.name: Biennale Yellow
styles.description: Solar yellow on warm parchment with deep indigo serif and atmospheric sun-glow gradients. Dutch-editorial atmosphere with a single-color signature.

styles.name: Blue Professional
styles.description: Cream paper background with electric cobalt blue accents. Clean modern professional — considered, polished, lightly authoritative.

styles.name: Broadside
styles.description: Dark editorial canvas with a single fire orange accent and bilingual Latin/Chinese type stack. Newspaper headline energy — dramatic, punchy, literary.

styles.name: Capsule
styles.description: Modular pill-shaped cards on warm bone with a full pastel-pop palette. Y2K-tinged, upbeat, graphic, approachable.

styles.name: Cartesian
styles.description: Quiet warm-neutral palette with classical Playfair serifs. Tasteful and unhurried — investment theses, white papers, advisory work.

styles.name: Cobalt Grid
styles.description: Electric cobalt serifs on a graph-paper canvas, anchored by stair-stepped pixel-glitch decorations and slim hairline rules. Quietly serious design/research bulletin.

styles.name: Creative Mode
styles.description: Cream paper canvas with confident multi-color (green, pink, orange, yellow) accents and Archivo Black display. Design-led and confident.

styles.name: Daisy Days
styles.description: Cheerful pastel deck with hand-drawn daisies, stars, and rainbows. Friendly, soft, and warm — education, kids, wellness, community.

styles.name: Editorial Tri-Tone
styles.description: Three-color editorial system: dusty pink, mustard cream, and deep burgundy. Bricolage + Instrument Serif. Fashion-magazine spread.

styles.name: Emerald Editorial
styles.description: Magazine-cover business deck: emerald + navy + paper, double-rule masthead ornaments, bold Bodoni-style display serif. Editorial gravitas without stiffness.

styles.name: Mat
styles.description: Dark sage canvas with bone paper and burnt-orange accent. Mid-century modern with wood undertones — design studio, architecture, ceramics.

styles.name: People's Platform
styles.description: Activist poster energy: blue, orange, red on cream, with Alfa Slab + Caveat Brush. Honest, loud, graphic — protest-poster energy.

styles.name: Pink Script — After Hours
styles.description: Black canvas, hot pink accent, pearl-cream paper, Instrument Serif headlines. Late-night editorial luxury — nocturnal, intentional, luxe.

styles.name: Playful
styles.description: Sun-warm peach background with Syne display. Friendly indie launch deck — warm, approachable, welcoming.

styles.name: Retro Windows
styles.description: Windows 95 chrome: gray title bars, MS Sans Serif, pixel typography. Full nostalgia — knowingly retro.

styles.name: Retro Zine
styles.description: Beige paper with green accent and Bebas Neue + Caveat. Riso-printed zine in HTML form — lo-fi, underground, crafted.

styles.name: Sakura Chroma
styles.description: Vintage Japanese cassette-package aesthetic: cream paper, diagonal rainbow ribbons, condensed bold type, JIS-style spec checkboxes. 80s-Japanese-tech.

styles.name: Scatterbrain
styles.description: Post-it inspired: pastel sticky notes, Caveat handwriting, Shrikhand and Zilla Slab type stack. Designer's whiteboard — messy-on-purpose.

styles.name: Signal
styles.description: Deep navy canvas with bone paper and a single muted-gold accent. Institutional with quiet weight — investor decks, board presentations.

styles.name: Studio
styles.description: Black canvas with electric-yellow type. High-voltage design studio aesthetic — the loudest in the library.

styles.name: Vellum
styles.description: Deep navy canvas with warm-yellow Cormorant serifs and a single dusty teal accent. Scholarly, literary, quietly intelligent.

styles.name: Avocado Press
styles.description: Clean duotone on white: deep French blue and pale avocado lime. Blue leads as ink and surface; lime is the punch. Airy, modern, not boxed-in.

styles.name: Berry Pop
styles.description: Fresh fruity brand palette: white page with deep raspberry-wine hero and pale periwinkle counter. Confident and playful, juice-bar energy.

styles.name: Checker Bloom
styles.description: Playful hand-painted folk palette: pale mint-green page with cobalt blue and grass green accents. Cheerful, naive-art, painted-poster energy.

styles.name: Cobalt Bloom
styles.description: Maximal-typographic two-tone editorial: electric cobalt on warm blush-salmon ground. Oversized type, fashion-magazine confidence, airy negative space.

styles.name: Confetti Wedge
styles.description: Playful, breezy, celebratory pastel. Confetti energy — joyful and light.

styles.name: Court Press
styles.description: Sporty, athletic, energetic clash. Court-sport energy with bold color blocking.

styles.name: Crayon Stack
styles.description: Primary crayon brights, loud and fun. Bold primary colors stacked with playful energy.

styles.name: Cut Bloom
styles.description: Calm two-color color-block: flat periwinkle blue and marigold yellow on white. No outlines, no shadows — pure solid color. Warm editorial softness.

styles.name: Grove Block
styles.description: Brand-forward, flat, confident green. Blocky brand identity with forest-green anchor.

styles.name: Jade Lens
styles.description: Calm, harmonious: warm putty canvas with large solid jade-emerald ellipses. Overlapping shapes produce deeper green lens. Serene geometry.

styles.name: Lime Slab
styles.description: Neobrutalist SaaS-landing aesthetic: single electric lime field and slab-heavy black type. Crisp white cards with thin charcoal rules. Loud but tidy.

styles.name: Linen Cut
styles.description: Mid-century modernist color-block: warm natural-linen ground with bold flat blocks in primary blue, green, red. Eames-era Herman Miller energy. Vast negative space.

styles.name: Macchiato
styles.description: Warm monochrome: almond and espresso tones. Quiet, refined, institutional warmth.

styles.name: Mint Brut
styles.description: Candy, friendly, app-like. Mint brutalism with playful confidence.

styles.name: Papier Bleu
styles.description: Matisse calm, artful, airy. French blue on white paper — art-school sophistication with restraint.

styles.name: Reading Room
styles.description: Quiet, literary, restrained, institutional. The hush of a university reading room — text-first, calm authority.

styles.name: Riptide Cobalt
styles.description: Bold poster, low density, high impact. Cobalt blue with riptide energy — maximal typography on minimal canvas.

styles.name: Riso Brut
styles.description: Neo-brutalist editorial, confident, designed. The safe, designed default — risograph-print energy with editorial discipline.

styles.name: Salmon Stamp
styles.description: Clean stamp poster: white with salmon and green. Low formality, clean graphic stamp-poster energy.

styles.name: Apricot Arc
styles.description: Warm, retro, geometric, friendly. Apricot tones with arc-shaped geometry — 70s warmth meets modern layout.

styles.name: Specimen Bold
styles.description: Type specimen, graphic, loud. Typography-as-art with bold specimen display.

styles.name: Violet Marker
styles.description: Highlighter aesthetic: white with violet and lime. Modern marker-stroke energy, low formality.

styles.name: Burst Panel
styles.description: Loud, energetic, dashboard. Panel-burst energy for high-impact data and comparisons.

styles.name: Bold Signal
styles.description: Confident, bold, modern, high-impact. Colored card on dark gradient with large section numbers. Archivo Black + Space Grotesk.

styles.name: Electric Studio
styles.description: Bold, clean, professional, high-contrast. Split panel — white top, blue bottom. Manrope throughout.

styles.name: Creative Voltage
styles.description: Bold, creative, energetic, retro-modern. Electric blue left panel, dark right, script accents. Syne + Space Mono.

styles.name: Dark Botanical
styles.description: Elegant, sophisticated, artistic, premium. Dark canvas with abstract soft gradient shapes. Cormorant + IBM Plex Sans.

styles.name: Notebook Tabs
styles.description: Editorial, organized, elegant, tactile. Cream paper card on dark background with colorful tabs. Bodoni Moda + DM Sans.

styles.name: Pastel Geometry
styles.description: Friendly, organized, modern, approachable. White card on pastel background with vertical pills. Plus Jakarta Sans throughout.

styles.name: Split Pastel
styles.description: Playful, modern, friendly, creative. Two-color vertical split (peach left, lavender right). Outfit throughout.

styles.name: Vintage Editorial
styles.description: Witty, confident, editorial, personality-driven. Centered content on cream with abstract geometric shapes. Fraunces + Work Sans.

styles.name: Neon Cyber
styles.description: Futuristic, techy, confident. Deep navy with cyan and magenta neon. Particle backgrounds, neon glow, grid patterns.

styles.name: Terminal Green
styles.description: Developer-focused, hacker aesthetic. GitHub dark with terminal green. Scan lines, blinking cursor, code syntax.

styles.name: Swiss Modern
styles.description: Clean, precise, Bauhaus-inspired. Pure white, pure black, red accent. Visible grid, asymmetric layouts.

styles.name: Paper & Ink
styles.description: Editorial, literary, thoughtful. Warm cream with charcoal and crimson accent. Drop caps, pull quotes, elegant rules.
